ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Continued To Sep-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Chase for Portia Rogers.

Mr. Chase stated that he has a copy of the waiver of bond and explained how the date of death was chosen. The Court stated that a Petition to Establish Fact of Death was needed first. Mr. Chase presented oral argument to support his petition. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to September 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to do further research.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
